name: Animal Workforce: Idle Tycoon Clicker
short_description: Animal Workforce: Idle Tycoon Clicker is a simple and laid-back game that’s easy to jump into. Perfect for casual play, it lets you unwind and progress at your own pace, all while collecting rewards and achieving upgrades. There are also plenty of easily obtained Steam Achievements!
detailed_description:
Animal Workforce: Idle Tycoon Clicker is a simple and laid-back game that’s easy to jump into. Perfect for casual play, it lets you unwind and progress at your own pace, all while collecting rewards and achieving upgrades. There are also plenty of easily obtained Steam Achievements!

Features:

  • Plenty of Upgrades – Unlock exciting upgrades like multipliers, speed boosts, discounts, and full automation to enhance your progress.

  • Milestone Rewards – Reach new goals and enjoy special rewards that keep the gameplay fresh.

  • Relax and Unwind – Play at your own pace, with a soothing experience designed for pure enjoyment.

  • Offline Earnings – Earn coins even when you're not playing, so you’re always advancing.

  • No Internet Required – Enjoy uninterrupted play wherever you are, no connection needed.

  • Highly Optimized – Uses minimal resources, making it smooth on all systems, even low-spec machines.

  • Completely Free of Microtransactions – No premium currency or pay-to-win features—just pure gameplay.

  • Easy Steam Achievements - All achievements can be obtained without having to spend half your life on this game!
